overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a continuous walk through a luxury residential property. The player moves from an enclosed garage with a yellow SUV, through Mediterranean-style interior hallways with arched doorways, and emerges into a sunny outdoor pool deck with tropical landscaping and views of a modern city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential garage with vehicle storage and shelving

events.description: camera passes alongside the yellow SUV from front to rear
approaching wooden door leading from garage to house interior

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow residential garage past storage shelves and a parked yellow SUV toward the interior door

entered.detail: wall-mounted metal shelving units with various stored items
tan-colored Patriot SUV parked in the garage center
pink and white tennis racket hanging on the wall
white slatwall with hanging tools and equipment
dark brown wooden door with brass handle leading to house interior

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow residential garage. The camera passes a yellow Patriot SUV parked in the center, with metal shelving and storage items visible on the walls. The player approaches a wooden door at the far end of the garage, with artificial fluorescent lighting illuminating the concrete floor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: Mediterranean-style interior hallway with arched doorways

events.description: exits garage through wooden door into house interior with terracotta flooring
approaching French doors with increasing natural light from outside

agents.ego_description: entering the house from the garage and walking through interior hallways with terracotta tile floors and arched doorways toward the pool access

entered.detail: reddish-brown terracotta tile flooring throughout the hallway
white plaster arched doorways with Spanish-style architecture
large potted palm trees placed in corners of the interior space
tall arched French doors with decorative black ironwork leading to pool
dark wooden storage cabinet against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the house from the garage, transitioning from artificial to mixed lighting. The interior features Mediterranean architecture with terracotta tile floors, white plaster walls, and arched doorways. Large potted palms and wooden furniture decorate the space as the camera moves through hallways toward ornate French doors that provide views of the outdoor pool area.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential pool deck with tropical landscaping and city views

events.description: exits house through French doors into bright sunny pool area
camera pans upward to reveal tall modern high-rise buildings against blue sky
camera pans right showing hot tub and landscaped garden areas

agents.ego_description: exploring the outdoor pool deck, walking around the kidney-shaped pool and admiring the tropical landscaping and downtown city skyline views

entered.detail: kidney-shaped swimming pool with turquoise water and decorative tile border
circular hot tub with blue tile trim adjacent to main pool
yellow cushioned lounge chairs arranged by the poolside
large orange patio umbrella providing shade over seating area
tall modern skyscraper with glass facade and yellow signage
tall palm trees and tropical vegetation surrounding the pool deck

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a bright, sunny outdoor pool deck with a kidney-shaped pool and adjacent hot tub. The area features yellow lounge chairs, an orange patio umbrella, and dense tropical landscaping with palm trees. The camera pans to reveal stunning views of a modern city skyline with tall glass high-rises against a clear blue sky, contrasting with the Mediterranean-style house architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the enclosed, utilitarian space of a residential garage into a bright, open-air luxury estate. It begins by passing a yellow Patriot SUV and metal shelving under artificial fluorescent lighting before approaching a wooden door at the end of the concrete space. As the camera enters the house, the environment shifts to a Mediterranean interior characterized by terracotta tile floors, white plaster walls, and arched doorways adorned with potted palms. The scene then expands through the hallways toward ornate French doors, transitioning from the shaded interior into the brilliant sunlight of an outdoor pool deck. Finally, the camera moves past a kidney-shaped pool and tropical landscaping to reveal a sweeping view of a modern city skyline with glass high-rises under a clear blue sky.
